explanations.6: This tells hadolint (a Dockerfile linter) to ignore rule DL3008, which warns about not pinning package versions in apt-get commands.
explanations.7: The 'set -e -x' makes the shell exit immediately if any command fails and print each command before running it, so errors don't silently continue.
explanations.13: This tells hadolint to ignore rule DL3013, which warns about not pinning pip package versions for reproducibility.
